metadata.description: Production hardening hooks for AI coding agents — quality gates, security guards, continuous QA, and psychology-informed session memory.

plugins.name: lacp-hardening
plugins.description: 5 lifecycle hooks (Stop quality gate, SessionStart context injection, PreToolUse security guards, PostToolUse continuous QA, UserPromptSubmit thinking nudge) + 11 context modes + 3 skills. Battle-tested across 3,000+ sessions.
